# Visual Constitution — Keth Communion

## Non-Negotiable Rules

1. Every Communion unit must be identifiable as alien from silhouette alone
2. Armor must read as grown, not forged — chitin over metal
3. Shape language: organic asymmetry, segmented plates, hooked appendages
4. Palette: amber/bone primary, cyan accent only, no warm metals

## Anti-Patterns

1. Generic human sci-fi armor
2. Surface noise over mass clarity
3. Too symmetrical and manufactured
